name: __ARM_ALIGN_MAX_PWR
meaning: Log of maximum alignment of static object

name: __ARM_ALIGN_MAX_STACK_PWR
meaning: Log of maximum alignment of stack object

name: __ARM_FEATURE_FAMINMAX
meaning: Floating-point absolute minimum and maximum extension

name: __ARM_FEATURE_FP16_FML
meaning: FP16 FML extension (Arm v8.4-A, optional Armv8.2-A, Armv8.3-A)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_GCS_DEFAULT
meaning: Guarded Control Stack protection can be enabled

name: __ARM_FEATURE_MATMUL_INT8
meaning: Integer Matrix Multiply extension (Armv8.6-A, optional Armv8.2-A, Armv8.3-A, Armv8.4-A, Armv8.5-A)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_MOPS
meaning: `memcpy`, `memset`, and `memmove` family of operations standardization instructions

name: __ARM_FEATURE_PAUTH_LR
meaning: Armv9.5-A Enhancements to Pointer Authentication Extension (FEAT_PAuth_LR)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_QRDMX
meaning: SQRDMLxH instructions and associated intrinsics availability

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SHA512
meaning: SHA2 Crypto ext. (Arm v8.4-A, optional Armv8.2-A, Armv8.3-A)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SM3
meaning: SM3 Crypto extension (Arm v8.4-A, optional Armv8.2-A, Armv8.3-A)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SM4
meaning: SM4 Crypto extension (Arm v8.4-A, optional Armv8.2-A, Armv8.3-A)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SME_F64F64
meaning: Double precision floating-point outer product intrinsics (FEAT_SME_F64F64)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SME_I16I64
meaning: 16-bit to 64-bit integer widening outer product intrinsics (FEAT_SME_I16I64)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE_BF16
meaning: SVE support for the 16-bit brain floating-point extension (FEAT_BF16)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE_BFSCALE
meaning: SVE support for the 16-bit brain floating-point vector multiplication extension (FEAT_SVE_BFSCALE)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE_BITS
meaning: The number of bits in an SVE vector, when known in advance

name: __ARM_FEATURE_F8F16MM
meaning: Modal 8-bit floating-point matrix multiply-accumulate to half-precision extension (FEAT_F8F16MM)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_F8F32MM
meaning: Modal 8-bit floating-point matrix multiply-accumulate to single-precision extension (FEAT_F8F32MM)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE_F16F32MM
meaning: 16-bit floating-point matrix multiply-accumulate to single-precision extension (FEAT_SVE_F16F32MM)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE_MATMUL_INT8
meaning: SVE support for the integer matrix multiply extension (FEAT_I8MM)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE_PREDICATE_OPERATORS
meaning: Level of support for C and C++ operators on SVE vector types

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE_VECTOR_OPERATORS
meaning: Level of support for C and C++ operators on SVE predicate types

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE2_AES
meaning: SVE2 support for the AES cryptographic extension (FEAT_SVE_AES)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE_AES2
meaning: SVE support for the multi-vector AES cryptographic and 128-bit polynomial multiply long extension (FEAT_SVE_AES2)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SSVE_AES
meaning: Streaming SVE support for the multi-vector AES cryptographic and 128-bit polynomial multiply long extension (FEAT_SSVE_AES)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE2_SHA3
meaning: SVE2 support for the SHA3 cryptographic extension (FEAT_SVE_SHA3)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE2_SM3
meaning: SVE2 support for the SM3 cryptographic extension (FEAT_SVE_SM3)

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE2_SM4
meaning: SVE2 support for the SM4 cryptographic extension (FEAT_SVE_SM4)

name: __ARM_PCS_VFP
meaning: Arm PCS hardware FP variant in use (32-bit-only)

name: __ARM_SIZEOF_MINIMAL_ENUM
meaning: Size of minimal enumeration type: 1 or 4

name: __ARM_FEATURE_BTI
meaning: extension is available on the target. It is undefined otherwise.

name: __ARM_FEATURE_LS64
meaning: `ST64B`, `ST64BV` and `ST64BV0` instructions for atomic 64-byte access to device memory are supported. This macro may only ever be defined in the AArch64 execution state. Intrinsics for using these instructions are specified in

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE2p1
meaning: are available and if the associated [ACLE features] (#sme-language-extensions-and-intrinsics) are supported.

name: __ARM_FEATURE_SVE2p2
meaning: are available and if the associated [ACLE features] (#sme-language-extensions-and-intrinsics) are supported.

meaning: 16-bit floating-point arithmetic instructions are supported in hardware and the associated scalar intrinsics defined by ACLE are available. Note that this implies:

name: __ARM_FEATURE_FP16_VECTOR_ARITHMETIC
meaning: floating-point arithmetic instructions are supported in hardware and the associated vector intrinsics defined by ACLE are available. Note that this implies:

name: __ARM_FEATURE_BF16_VECTOR_ARITHMETIC
